title: Amtech F1110 5 Piece 6.25mm (1/4") Titanium coated high speed steel (HSS) drill bit set
features: DURABLE: These 6.25mm (1/4") shank high speed steel (HSS) drill bits are heat treated and have a titanium nitride coating for excellent cutting performance
VERSATILE: The set includes sizes: 1.5mm, 2.5mm, 3.2mm, 4mm and 4.8mm and can be used with most popular power tools
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 5Pc 1/4" Titanium Drill Bit Set See more
